title: Community Interest Companies Regulator Annual Report 2024 to 2025
body: "This report outlines the activities of the Office of the Regulator of Community Interest Companies (CIC Regulator) during the 2024 to 2025 financial year.  It provides an overview of the CIC Regulator’s performance, with accounting and expenditure information. It also includes statistics showing the number of community interest companies (CICs) that were approved, dissolved and converted, and a breakdown of CICs by region. "
